report.title: Reprint Push Progress
firstViewportText: Current proof is lab/model evidence: 76 Node tests plus packaged-plugin activation of /wp-json/reprint/v1/push/*, signed session/nonce cleanup, disabled packaged auth bootstrap, and 401 refusal for an unprovisioned alternate credential path. Production push remains blocked by real credential lifecycle, durable journal storage, leases/fencing, WordPress graph identity, and general plugin drivers.
Scan view only. Detailed evidence lives in the linked docs.
Unsafe topology mutations are suppressed and owner-plugin drift is blocked in the model. Gap: real WordPress graph identity.
Recovery journaling now covers durable write failures and replay envelopes in the model. Gap: production durability and crash proof.
